name: icon
description: A decorative or meaningful glyph. Sizes are set in em so an icon scales with the text it accompanies. Color inherits by default.

name.description: Icon identifier from the active icon set.

size.description: Glyph size relative to the surrounding text.

decorative.description: When true, the icon is hidden from assistive tech; when false, it must carry a label.

a11y.contrast: Meaningful icons meet the 3:1 non-text contrast rule against their background.
notes: Decorative icons set aria-hidden and add no accessible name.
A meaningful icon (e.g. the only content of a control) must provide a text alternative.

elementor.notes: Compiles to the Elementor Icon widget; em sizing keeps the glyph aligned to adjacent text.

mapping.name: Content → Icon
mapping.tone: Style → Color, bound to a Global Color or currentColor
